data.name: MITH: Make It To Heaven
data.detailed_description:
MITH: Make It To Heaven is an NSFW visual novel set in a magical university where humans are anything but ordinary.
You are the first human to be accepted in the prestigious Arcane Academy a long time. Meet and seduce all types of characters, from demons, to angels, to witches, and many more! Does your unassuming status as a human make you an outcast? Or will you use it to your advantage? Find out in MITH!

✦ Key Features

✧ Character-Driven Story
Experience a narrative focused on relationships, personal stories, and player choice. Each character has their own personality, background, and evolving storyline.

✧ Multiple Romance Options
Meet and build relationships with a diverse cast of characters, each with their own preferences and progression!

✧ NSFW Content
Unlock adult scenes through character routes and story progression. Content is integrated into the narrative and tied to your decisions.

✧ Exploration System
Navigate a fully explorable point-and-click map of the Arcane Academy, discovering locations, events, and character interactions.

✧ Ongoing Story Updates (Early Access)
The story is released in chapters, with each update expanding the world, characters, and available content.

✦ Current Early Access Content (0.1)

  • Over 40,000 words of story content

  • 5 datable characters, each with unique storylines

  • 10 unlockable NSFW scenes

  • A fully explorable academy map

  • Multiple events and interactions across different locations

data.short_description: MITH: Make It To Heaven is an NSFW visual novel set in an fantasy university. You are the first human to be accepted in the prestigious Arcane Academy university a long time, this will bring you a lot of attention from your peers, who you can date in MITH!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible (or equivalent ARM64)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0+ or DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
